failure_classification.legacy_contract_tests: These test the v0.10 contract that used --agent-address / --publisher-address / resolveCurrentAgent (BOUNTY_IM_ADDRESS). Phase 4 will UPDATE these tests to the v0.14 contract per user instruction (4).
failure_classification.non_legacy_regression_known_29: Per user instruction: 'proactively fix the 29 known non-legacy regressions even though they appear in the resume baseline'. These are functional tests (publish.json/quiet, publish-large-payload, error-classification, ProfileContext, com-send demandOption) that test real CLI behavior beyond identity parsing. They will be addressed in Phase 4 as part of refactor-coverage.
